title: Loot+
description: Hostile Mobs Now Drop UNIQUE LOOT BAGS! [Highly Configurable]
body:
![Loot+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11a587f10497feadc04e3b0a35ea94eb73dec7a2.png)





Adds loot bags that have a chance to drop when you defeat hostile mobs, giving combat a rewarding twist.
You’ll also find loot crates that naturally spawn on beaches for extra exploration rewards.





## **Features:**

💥 **Loot Bags**: Random drops from hostile mobs with configurable drop chances.

🪵 **Loot Crates**: Found on beaches.

⚙️ **Config Support**: Available for Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1. (Drop chances only.)

A simple, vanilla-friendly way to make combat and exploration more rewarding—without changing the core gameplay.
